mapper.sql: id, name, category_id, price, stock, image, description, status, is_flash_sale, flash_price, flash_stock, flash_start_time, flash_end_time,create_time, update_time
mapper.update:
UPDATE product
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
stock = #{stock},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
status = #{status},
is_flash_sale = #{isFlashSale},
flash_price = #{flashPrice},
flash_stock = #{flashStock},
flash_start_time = #{flashStartTime},
flash_end_time = #{flashEndTime},
update_time = #{updateTime}
WHERE id = #{id}
update product set stock=stock-#{quantity}, update_time = now() where id=#{productId} and status=1 and stock >= #{quantity}
update product set stock=stock+#{quantity}, update_time= now() where id=#{productId}
UPDATE product SET flash_stock = flash_stock + #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_flash_sale = 1
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM product WHERE status = 1 AND is_flash_sale = 1 AND flash_start_time <= NOW() AND flash_end_time >= NOW() AND flash_stock > 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM product WHERE status = 1 AND is_flash_sale = 1 AND flash_stock > 0 AND flash_end_time >= NOW() AND flash_start_time <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) ORDER BY flash_start_time ASC
select count(*) from product where category_id = #{categoryId}

select count(*) from product p left join category c on p.category_id = c.id
p.status = 1
and ( p.name like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or p.description like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or c.name like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') )
and p.category_id = #{categoryId}
and p.is_flash_sale = 1
